About

Newsela launched in 2013 with a bold mission: Meaningful classroom learning for every student. Today, our team constantly strives to deliver powerful solutions that inspire our users.

Our StoryContent PartnersPressCareers
SupportContact Us

Do work that matters

Inspire a generation of learners. Support and empower teachers. Shape the future of K-12 education.

Join our team

What We Do

Newsela is an education technology company with a portfolio of high-quality instructional and assessment products dedicated to meaningful classroom learning for every student. Our company was founded on the principle that while every child learns differently, they all deserve a rich learning experience that ignites a love of learning and drives student outcomes.
‍
We build our suite of products based on learning science research to deliver the most engaging, authentic content and activities to modernize how teaching happens in the classroom. Along with interactive assessments and tools, we provide teachers with digital content at five reading levels—from +175 of the best content providers—that is relevant to the diverse backgrounds and interests of their students. Since we started in 2013, we’ve become an essential solution for 90% of U.S. K-12 schools and serve +25 million users.

Our Impact

ESSA Tier II studies show Newsela products accelerate learning across ELA and social studies

Learn more

Serving 90% of U.S. schools including 20 million students and 1.5 million teachers.

Meet our customers

Inspiring students to apply their learning beyond the classroom, and change lives.

Our Benefits

Health

Access to the world’s leading medical experts for healthcare. Pets included!

Learning

Continue your learning—on us!

Wellness

Discounts and resources to stay healthy: Mind and body.

Remote Work

A fully remote team across the country.

Family

Generous time off for your most important job—maternity, paternity, and adoption.

Time Off

Unlimited time to recharge.

Meet some of our team

“It’s rare to find a company that is equal parts socially driven and such a promising tech innovator. The balance of the two makes for a great work environment with a lot of upward mobility and fast-paced growth.”

Sales team member

“Creating Newsela’s content is so fulfilling! What we deliver speaks to students' interests and incorporates identities that have historically been marginalized. A wide array of students now see themselves and the things they care about reflected in what they're reading, which leads to more engaged learning and builds empathy.”

Content team member

“I’ve been given the opportunity to solve more interesting problems during my time at Newsela than I would have been at most other companies. The work is thought-provoking and tackling it with an exceptional team that I can learn from and respect makes it all the more fulfilling.”

Product team member

Join Our Team

We seek passionate, creative employees with a commitment to making an impact on K-12 education. If you believe that all students deserve a more engaging, accessible, and authentic learning experience, please apply to join our team.
